entities.description: As a subsection of '1硬件资源', this section describes the B2B connectors used on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailing their industrial-grade connection method and role in extending IO functionality.
Refers to the industrial-grade B2B connectors used for IO expansion on the SOM-TL3588 board, as described in section 1.7.
Refers to the input/output interfaces extended through the B2B connectors, as discussed in section 1.7.

relations.description: The concept of 'B2B连接器' is a primary topic of section 1.7.
The concept of 'IO' is a primary topic of section 1.7.
